# Generated by ollama (deepseek-coder)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure VMs with public IP addresses for direct access. Assign public IPs to each VM so developers can RDP/SSH directly without setting up a Bastion host or VPN. This simplifies our development environment setup.
# Category: cloud_compute_security

parameters: 
- name: vmAdminUsername   # admin username for the virtual machine, required parameter (mandatory)   
  type: string            # data source type as string     
  defaultValue: 'admin'    

resources: 
- provider: "Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines"       
  name: ${vmAdminUsername}   // VM resource id, required parameter (mandatory)   
  apiVersion: "2019-06-01"      # API version for the deployment operation    
  location: 'eastus'            # Location of your resources. Required Parameter      
  tags: {}                     # Tags to be added on resource, optional parameter  

properties:    // VM properties       
  hardwareProfile:           /// Hardware configuration required     
    vmSize: "Standard_D2s_v3"     // Virtual machine size (required)         
  osProfile:                 // OS profile for the virtual machines. Required Parameter      
   computerName: ${vmAdminUsername}         // The name of the computer or node to be created on   
   adminUsername: "${parameters('adminUser')}"     /// Administrator username and password are required     
  networkProfile:            // Network configuration. Required Parameter      
    interface: []              # List if your VMs have multiple NIC, optional parameter (mandatory)          
   vmSshKey: "{ 'name': '', 'publicKey': '' }"     /// Public SSH key for the virtual machine to access via VMSsh protocol. Optional Parameter      
  storageProfile:            // Storage configuration required     
    imageReference:          # Image reference object, optional parameter (mandatory)       
      $schema = "http://schemastore.org/schemas/imageReference.json/"     /// URN of the referenced schema                     
    $id = "/subscriptions/{subscriptionId}/resourceGroups/{resourceGroupName}/providers/Microsoft.Compute/virtualMachines/myVM"      // Fully qualified ARM id for image reference   
  vmSize: "Standard_D2s_v3"     /// Virtual machine size (required)
